review_text: Had a lovely Easter break at Blairgowrie Holiday Park with my girlfriends. The cabin was cosy, clean and had everything we needed, even a BBQ Webber that we used every night! The location is perfect, tucked away from the main drag with lovely greenery and a short walk from the beach/main shops/coffee etc. We also met the new management, who were incredibly friendly, and it was exciting to hear about their plans to upgrade the park!!

We had a wonderful Easter weekend here. New owners are clearly aiming to keep a friendly and authentic caravan park atmosphere whilst upgrading the facilities, and they've struck a great balance. New toilet blocks and great showers. The management were super responsive- we had an issue with the power in our cabin (our fault) and within 15 minutes on Easter Sunday morning they were down to fix it. An excellent peaceful location with loads of birds and big old trees. Definitely recommend!

This place has had a glow up! Refreshed toilet block is great. New management are lovely. Love this location-close to the beach but nested away in the beautiful trees…away from too much hustle and bustle.

5 stars all the way to the Caravan Park Managers, Suze and Dean. Nothing is ever too difficult. Welcoming and friendly people. Extremely obliging.  Always greeted with a friendly smile and Dean is always making sure the park and amenities are in order. Keep up the great work. You guys are awesome 👌 👏
We travel to many caravan parks. For us, it's about the ease and friendliness of a park.
Quality park managers make a big difference.
MARIE AND CON

Great short stay in a perfect location. The park is ideally situated close to the shops and right near the front beach, making everything easy to access. The renovated amenities are modern and very clean, which made our stay even more comfortable. The park itself is quiet, well maintained, and easy navigate with campers and caravans. Hats off to the new ownership group - a relaxing spot we’d very happily stay at again.
New owners doing a great job with the park, such a beautiful part of the world, will definitely visit again!
Stayed here overnight, the owners were very helpful. Will definitely stay here again 😁

We rang up at short notice during a very busy period, and they made room for us, which gave us the opportunity to explore the Mornington Peninsula. They are making improvements to what is a very central, quiet and convenient caravan park. We played golf and snorkelled to our hearts content. Their newly refurbished amenities block is spot on. ⭐️
Thank you so much for having us. We will be back.
New owners make this a great relaxing place to holiday -

Just been taken over by new owners. Super friendly and have great plans for the future.
Already have new amenities block
Stayed a week to explore the area

Looks like a change of Owners and Managers has things going in the right Direction. Dean was great, showed us multiple sites. Already 1 new amenity block, great showers and new toilets. Peaceful and quiet sites, loved it and can definitely recommend.
Fantastic 'Old School' beach holiday caravan park.  No randoms - owners only. Bush setting where kids are safe to play. Minutes walk to the beach.
Fantastic family friendly park with walkable access to beach.

Ideal location. An owners-only park with no permanent residents, meaning everyone that stays there is vetted and trustworthy. The rules in place serve to keep the place quiet and safe. Like stepping back in time, to a place you can limit your kids roam.
Lots of trees, quiet and super friendly people. No over night stays so you know everyone here and feel very safe

Buyer beware. Owner has already been taken to vcat for discrimination.  He won’t let teenage or young adult children stay at park.  Only wants older couples or young families.  He is extremely rude and unreasonable and picks and chooses who can stay or buy into park.  I think it is a game to him.  Unpleasant experience and unfair.
Grumpy site owner, not a nice man at all.
